view_title: รูปด้านหน้า + รูปตัด + แบบขยายกลอนประตู (ประตูรั้วบ้าน)

elements.material: เหล็ก Ø1"x1" LG. ปลายตัด 45 องศา @ 15 ซม.
elements.description: Vertical picket bars of the swing gate, spaced 150mm on center, ends cut at 45 degrees

elements.material: แผ่นเหล็กทึบ หนา 4 มม.

Swing/sliding gate elevation ('รูปด้านหน้า'), between two posts, sitting on ระดับทางเท้า/ระดับถนน (sidewalk/road level)

elements.material: เหล็กแผ่น 40x40x9 มม. ฝังในคอนกรีต

ล้อเหล็ก Ø3" คู่ (paired steel wheels), for the sliding gate bottom rail

แบบขยายกลอนประตู (1:10) — round steel bar Ø2cm ('เหล็กกลม Ø2 ซม เชื่อมกับแผ่นเหล็ก') welded to a 9mm steel plate ('แผ่นเหล็ก 9 มม เจาะรู Ø2 ซม สำหรับคล้องกุญแจ') mounted between the gate leaf ('ประตู') and post ('เสา'); a 0.05 offset dimension and a 0.20 plan-depth dimension are shown

warnings: PATTERN unchanged from t3 ('section'). Under the new taxonomy 'section' is defined as steel-spec/dimension detail ('สเปคเหล็ก/มิติ'); although the worked examples given are RC beam/column/footing, this gate sheet contains genuine steel-member size/thickness callouts with dimensions (1"x1"/2"x2" tube, 4mm/9mm plate) on a physical cross-section+elevation detail, which fits the literal definition even though it is fabricated steel hardware rather than RC rebar. Kept as 'section' rather than reclassified to 'side_profile', unlike the eave/wc1 sheets which had no steel spec at all -- this is the deciding distinction applied consistently across this extraction round.

This sheet (A-13) is a wrought-iron/steel perimeter gate detail (แบบขยายประตูรั้วบ้าน), not part of the main house structure -- no grid_source applies and no grid_ref is claimed for any element here; standalone site/boundary element.

Contains steel member callouts (bar sizes, plate thickness) but is architectural fabrication detail, not RC rebar in the beam/column/footing sense -- kept in the flexible architectural element shape (material/description) rather than forced into the structural main_bar/stirrup schema.

The 4.00 m overall gate width and the 1"x1"/2"x2" steel sizes and 4mm/9mm plate thicknesses are all clearly legible and high confidence; only the exact 5-way height sub-breakdown (0.20/0.50/0.20/0.50/0.20 summing to 2.00m band spacing on the post) and the anchor-plate section detail are lower confidence and flagged for zoom review.
Independent read done first, then cross-checked against t3's หน้า15_gate_detail.json: identical element set, materials, and dimensions. No content disagreement found.
